# Moonlight Ridge

> A private mountaintop couples retreat above Red River Gorge, Kentucky. Luxury cabin rental with private hot tub, fire pit, and ridgeline views. Designed for two.

## About

Moonlight Ridge is a luxury short-term rental cabin located on a private mountaintop above the Red River Gorge in Kentucky. It is designed exclusively for couples seeking privacy, nature, and five-star comfort.

## Property Details

- Location: Red River Gorge, Kentucky (mountaintop, no neighbors)
- Accommodates: 2 guests (marketed as couples retreat)
- Bedrooms: 1 (king bed with luxury linens)
- Bathrooms: 1
- Pet-friendly: Yes
- Rating: 4.95 stars

## Amenities

- Private hot tub
- Outdoor fire pit
- Rocking chair porch with ridgeline views
- Full kitchen
- Washer/dryer
- Fast Wi-Fi
- Smart TV

## Location Highlights

- Minutes from world-class rock climbing and hiking in Red River Gorge
- Spectacular October foliage
- Dark skies for stargazing
- Complete privacy — no visible neighbors

## Booking

Book at: https://moonlightridgeky.com
